verses.text: Tua ciangin Job in dawng a
“Ka lunggimna kitawikhai hen la, ka haksatna khempeuh kitawiteh leh
Tuipi sehnel khempeuh sangin gikzaw ding ahih manin ka kampaute guhin a kha hi
Vanglianpa' thaltangte in kei hong kha a, ka sungah a thal gu kidiah hi. Pasian in a kihtakhuai-in kei hong su hi
Gam late in lopa a nek laitakin ham a, bawngtal in an a nek laitakin ham ahi hiam
An limlote, ci sawhloin kine thei a, aktui da kang in limna nei ahi hiam
Ka kam in tuate ciam nuamlo a, tuate khempeuh a luaksuahhuai an tawh a kibang lel ahi hi
“Ka ngetna ngah thei hi leng a, Pasian in ka deihna hong pia ding hi leh
Pasian in kei hong sucip hen la, a khut zanin kei hong that vet leh
Tua hi leh keima kihehnepna hi ding a, hih zahta ka thuakna-ah nuamin ka diang ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Siangtho Pa' thu ka nial khat zong omlo hi
Ka thuak laina dingin bang hatna nei nawn a, lungduai-a ka omna dingin lamet ding bang om nawn ahi hiam
Ka thahatna suang bang hi a, ka pumpi in sumngo tha paii ahi hiam
Kei leh kei' sung panin huhna bangci ngahtawm theihding ka hi hiam? Kei hong kihuhna ding ka ngetna ding kuamah omlo hi
“Pasian ka nusia a, ka nusia kei zongin, hih bang lungkham hunin lawm citak ka kisam hi
No ka lawmte pen, lui tuikhang bang, a mangthang pak tui let bang
nin a khalhnelh vuk leh tuikhal bangin na zuautat uh hi
Khua a lum ciangin tuate tui mangthang a, ni a sat ciangin a kang hi
Tua tui a zong dingin khualzin mite pai kawikawi a, gamsung tengah kawi pai-in a mangthang uh hi
Tema khuami khualzinte in zong tua tui zong uh a, Sheba mite in zong tua tui muan'in a nei uh hi
Ahi zongin tua a lametna uhah cimawh uh hi. Tua tui zuan uh a, a omloh ciangin cihna ding theiloin kamka lel uh hi
Tu-in zong kei-a' dingin note tua bang lel na hi uh hi. Ka gimna teng nong mu uh a, na lau uh hi
No kiangah, ‘Na khat peuhpeuh hong pia un, ka suahtakna dingin sum tawh hong huh un
ka galte' kiang panin hong honkhia un, kei a hong nengniamte' khutsung panin hong tankhia un,’ hong ci ngei zenzen ka hi hiam
“Hong hilh thei le uh cin, pauloin ka ompah ding hi. Ka khialhna hong theitelsak dih un
Lungsim takpi tawh thugennate hehloin kisang thei a, ahi zongin no hong taiina in bang phatuamsak ahi hiam
Kamging mawkmawk lelte heh taak sa a, huih' letmang cihmawh kamte thupi ngaihsut na hi uh hiam
Mi cimawh khat suksiatgawp sawm a, na lawm khat uh hihgawp sawm na hi uh hiam
Tu-in kong thum hi; kihei un la kei hong en un. Na maitang uhah zuau a gen dingin kilawm ka hi hiam
Ngaihsun pha un, a kilawm lopi-in kei hong hih kei un. Ngaihsun pha un, ka hoihna teng a hong kize-et hi lel hi
Ahi zongin zuau gen mahin nong ngaihsun lai veve uh a, a sia leh a pha a khenthei loin nong seh lai veve uh hi.
